name: @simple-asteroid-game/server
description: This is the server for the asteroid game

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('src','db','migrations');const dst=path.join('dist','server','src','db','migrations');fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(src,{withFileTypes:true})){const s=path.join(src,e.name);const d=path.join(dst,e.name);if(e.isDirectory()){fs.cpSync(s,d,{recursive:true})}else{fs.copyFileSync(s,d)}}"

author: Rico Trebeljahr
